steps.title: Identify the stated requirement
steps.content: The student must provide an example of one of Catlett's sculptures — not just any artwork, but specifically a sculpture.

steps.title: Determine which choice fulfills it
steps.content:
C specifically names Star Gazer as Catlett's sculpture.
  • A presents a print rather than sculpture
  • B discusses her general style without naming a specific work
  • D provides only biographical information
. That matches choice C — C is correct.
